chunks.question: What are the titles and authors of recent technical reports listed?
chunks.answer: Digital Twin, Variability-Aware Modeling, Energy Monitoring.

chunks.question: What topics are covered in the 2015 and 2014 reports?
chunks.answer: Energy efficiency games and mobile environment estimation.
